research.title: Google Antigravity Deep Dive — Gemini 3 Pro Agentic IDE vs Claude Code & Cursor
research.whyTrending: Launched Nov 18, 2025 alongside Gemini 3. Google's first agent-first IDE: agents get direct access to editor + terminal + browser, plan/execute/verify end-to-end. Public preview free on Mac/Win/Linux. Gemini 3.1 Pro + 3 Flash. Most coverage is launch-day fluff — nobody has published a 'I used it for a week on a real project' breakdown vs Claude Code.
